finding: `doctor` remains permanently blocked by any JSON file under `.atm/runtime/incidents` even after the conflicting tasks are done and their canonical locks and broker intents are released. Core exports `clearIncidentFlags()` but no CLI surface invokes it or verifies that the incident is resolved.
expectedBehavior: Provide an audited `incident status/resolve` command that re-evaluates current owners, locks, broker intents, and dirty paths before clearing flags; doctor should distinguish active from resolved incidents.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed 2026-07-14: `readIncidentFlag()` reconciles and auto-archives resolved incidents. Regression: `packages/core/src/broker/__tests__/cross-task-mutation-guard.test.ts`.
followUp: Optional follow-up: expose CLI `incident status/resolve` on top of core reconcile.
